name: @htmlwasher/native
description: napi-rs v3 binding around the htmlwasher-native Rust extraction core (boilerplate removal + page-type classifier). Consumed only by the htmlwasher pipeline.

scripts.build: node -e "const cp = require('node:child_process'); const hasCargo = cp.spawnSync('cargo', ['--version']).status === 0; if (!hasCargo && !process.env.npm_config_rebuild_native) { console.log('@htmlwasher/native: skipping build (no cargo on PATH; committed prebuilds present; set npm_config_rebuild_native=1 to force).'); process.exit(0); } cp.execSync('napi build --platform --release --features napi', { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.test: node -e "const cp = require('node:child_process'); if (cp.spawnSync('cargo', ['--version']).status === 0 || process.env.npm_config_rebuild_native) { cp.execSync('cargo test --workspace', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } else { console.log('@htmlwasher/native: skipping cargo test (no cargo on PATH).'); } cp.execSync('vitest run', { stdio: 'inherit' });"
